title: odontarrhena eriophylla
intro: Odontarrhena eriophylla, also known as Western yarrow, is a perennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the western United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and volatile oils. The health benefits of Western yarrow include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. Western yarrow can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
